sections.title: About
paragraphs: We are searching for backend Dev to work on our projects w @mithriy
Below is vacancy description, please share to your friends or connections, lets find together best candidate to join our team!
High-tech blockchain US startup is searching for someone experienced with high-performant and secure backend development in NodeJS and PostgreSQL.

sections.title: Responsibilities
bullets: Maintain and improve existing microservices on backend (NodeJS + Postgres + Kafka);
Develop new services and client API for blockchain nodes;
Develop rest API services for interactive websites.

sections.title: Requirements
bullets: NodeJS and Typescript several years experience;
Knowledge of REST API design standards;
Knowledge of Microservice architecture design is a +;
Either good english or ok english and russian is required.

sections.title: We offer
bullets: Remote or work in Antalya (relocation is sponsored);
Command retreats all over the world.

sections.title: Job Nature
paragraphs: The options of remote work are available to candidates.

narrative: ## About Hi team! We are searching for backend Dev to work on our projects w @mithriy Below is vacancy description, please share to your friends or connections, lets find together best candidate to join our team! High-tech blockchain US startup is searching for someone experienced with high-performant and secure backend development in NodeJS and PostgreSQL.

## Responsibilities - Maintain and improve existing microservices on backend (NodeJS + Postgres + Kafka); - Develop new services and client API for blockchain nodes; - Develop rest API services for interactive websites.

## Requirements - NodeJS and Typescript several years experience; - Knowledge of REST API design standards; - PostgreSQL usage experience; - Good computer science fundamentals; - Discipline with code testing; - Knowledge of Microservice architecture design is a +; - Kafka experience is a +; - Cryptography is a +; - Either good english or ok english and russian is required.
## We offer: - Great team of professionals; - More than a competitive salary; - Conference budget; - Remote or work in Antalya (relocation is sponsored); - Command retreats all over the world.
## Job Nature The options of remote work are available to candidates.
